zh.lifeSummary: 當William Fisher於大約1525年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可希勒哈姆時，他的父親Robert Fisher32歲，母親Lucille Olive Middleton24歲。他於1551年10月15日與Margery Bert在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯特拉德布洛可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1591年7月4日在他的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可素斯 艾爾哈姆 聖 詹姆斯聖 加也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Fisher于大约1525年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可希勒哈姆时，他的父亲Robert Fisher32岁，母亲Lucille Olive Middleton24岁。他于1551年10月15日与Margery Bert在英国英格兰素福爾可斯特拉德布洛可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1591年7月4日在他的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可素斯 艾爾哈姆 聖 詹姆斯聖 加也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Fisher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fisherman, from Middle English fis(sc)her(e) ‘fisherman’ (Old English fiscere). In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from many other languages, including German Fischer and its Slavic(ized) variant Fišer (see Fiser ), Dutch Visser , Hungarian Halász (see Halasz ), Italian Pescatore , Slovenian Ribič (see Ribic ), and Croatian Ribić or Ribar .

English: in a few cases, possibly a topographic name for someone who lived near a fish weir on a river, from Middle English fis(sc)hwere, fisshyar ‘fish weir’ (Old English fiscwer, fiscgear), or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Fisher in North Mundham, Sussex.
Irish: translation into English of Gaelic Ó Bradáin ‘descendant of Bradán’, a personal name meaning ‘salmon’. See Braden .

variants.name: Fischer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Gerhard, Helmut, Fritz, Klaus, Horst, Dieter, Franz, Ernst.

German, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a fisherman, from Middle High German visch, German Fisch ‘fish’ + the agent suffix -er. This form of the surname is also established in some other parts of Europe, notably in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, and the Netherlands. In Poland, Czechia, Croatia, and Slovenia it is (also) established in the Slavicized forms Fiszer (Polish) and Fišer (see Fiser ). Compare Fisher .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When William Fisher was born about 1525, in Syleham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Fisher, was 32 and his mother, Lucille Olive Middleton, was 24. He married Margery Bert on 15 October 1551, in Stradbroke, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 4 July 1591, in his hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in St James's Church, South Elmham St James, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Fisher est né environ 1525, à Syleham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Fisher, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lucille Olive Middleton, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margery Bert le 15 octobre 1551, à Stradbroke, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 4 juillet 1591, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à St James's Church, South Elmham St James, Suffolk, Angleterre.

Lui sposato Margery Bert il 15 ottobre 1551, nel Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 4 luglio 1591, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a St James's Church, South Elmham St James, Suffolk, England.

ko.St James's Church, South Elmham St James: 영국 수폴크 소우스 엘함 스트 자메스 스트 자메스'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: William Fisher(이)가 대략 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 실함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Fisher(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucille Olive Middleton(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1551년 10월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스트라드브로크에서 Margery Bert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1591년 7월 4일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 소우스 엘함 스트 자메스 스트 자메스'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Fisher nasceu aproximadamente 1525, em Syleham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Fisher, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lucille Olive Middleton, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Bert em 15 de outubro de 1551, em Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de julho de 1591, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em St James's Church, South Elmham St James, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.St James's Church, South Elmham St James: ст джемес'с чурч, соут элмхам ст джемесь, суффолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Fisher родился около 1525 г. в местности силэам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Fisher было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lucille Olive Middleton, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Bert 15 октября 1551 г. в местности страдброк, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 4 июля 1591 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности ст джемес'с чурч, соут элмхам ст джемесь, суффолк, Англия.
